repos.name: iptv-org/iptv
repos.desc: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

repos.name: teslamate-org/teslamate
repos.desc: A self-hosted data logger for your Tesla 🚘 [main maintainer=@JakobLichterfeld]

repos.name: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
repos.desc: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

repos.name: chatwoot/chatwoot
repos.desc: Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesforce Service Cloud etc. 🔥💬

repos.name: krahets/hello-algo
repos.desc: 《Hello 算法》：动画图解、一键运行的数据结构与算法教程。支持简中、繁中、English、日本語，提供 Python, Java, C++, C, C#, JS, Go, Swift, Rust, Ruby, Kotlin, TS, Dart 等代码实现

repos.name: freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp
repos.desc: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.

repos.name: trycua/cua
repos.desc: Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).

repos.name: jwasham/coding-interview-university
repos.desc: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.

repos.name: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
repos.desc: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

repos.name: music-assistant/server
repos.desc: Music Assistant is a free, opensource Media library manager that connects to your streaming services and a wide range of connected speakers. The server is the beating heart, the core of Music Assistant and must run on an always-on device like a Raspberry Pi, a NAS or an Intel NUC or alike.

repos.name: Free-TV/IPTV
repos.desc: M3U Playlist for free TV channels

repos.name: Raphire/Win11Debloat
repos.desc: A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.

repos.name: mikeroyal/Self-Hosting-Guide
repos.desc: Self-Hosting Guide. Learn all about locally hosting (on premises & private web servers) and managing software applications by yourself or your organization. Including Cloud, LLMs, WireGuard, Automation, Home Assistant, and Networking.

repos.name: itsfatduck/optimizerDuck
repos.desc: Free, open-source Windows optimization tool for performance, privacy, and simplicity.

repos.name: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
repos.desc: Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.

repos.name: shiyu-coder/Kronos
repos.desc: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets

> 📅 2026-06-16  |  🔍 共收录 18 个热门项目

早上好，各位键盘侠。今天的 GitHub Trending 告诉我们：世界各地的开发者们依然在不睡觉地写代码。以下是今日战况 ⬇️

## 📊 今日统计
